objections.question: Do you have dashboards?
objections.truth_bound_answer: No. Current v0 does not include dashboards.

objections.question: Can this work for teams?
objections.truth_bound_answer: No as team runtime. Current v0 is a bounded one-coach pilot.

objections.question: Can I compare athletes?
objections.truth_bound_answer: No as comparison or ranking tooling. Current v0 supports factual surfaces and history counts only.

objections.question: Can I export proof?
objections.truth_bound_answer: No. Current v0 does not include proof export or evidence sealing.

objections.question: Can this track outcomes?
objections.truth_bound_answer: No. Current v0 is not an outcome tracking or performance proof layer.
